nasb.text: Then he mustered the young men of the rulers of the provinces, and there were 232; and after them he mustered all the people, even all the sons of Israel, 7,000.

esv.text: Then he mustered the servants of the governors of the districts, and they were 232. And after them he mustered all the people of Israel, seven thousand.

cnv.text: 於是亞哈數點了跟從各省省長的年輕人，共有二百三十二人。以後，他又數點所有的人民，以色列眾民共有七千人。

ccb.text: 于是，亚哈召集了省长属下的青年军二百三十二人，又召集以色列全军，共七千人。
